pageContext.name: Powerpuff Girls Set
pageContext.description: Beast Kingdom takes viewers back to where it all started with the release of the Powerpuff Girls in articulated Dynamic 8ction Heroes form. Based on the very first iteration of the characters, each figure includes 5 points of articulation and real fabric clothing! A selection of replaceable face sculpts, arms, and legs in different poses expands the ways to pose each hero. The DX version of the set also comes with an iconic heart, base to showcase the girls in flight and recreate the intro from the animated show!
